title: Task 6: 前端记录显示支持 (AC: 1)
summary: Implementation correctly fulfills the acceptance criteria for Task 6. Window info (title and process name) is displayed in both the record list (App.vue) and record details modal (ScreenshotModal.vue) with appropriate icons. Tests pass (159 total) and cover the main scenarios. However, there are code quality issues: the getWindowIcon() function is duplicated between two components, and the template inefficiently calls getWindowInfo() multiple times per record.

issues.description: getWindowIcon() function is duplicated in App.vue (lines 229-256) and ScreenshotModal.vue (lines 93-120). Changes to icon mappings require updating two files.
issues.suggestion: Extract getWindowIcon() to a shared utility file (e.g., src/utils/windowIcons.js) and import it in both components.

issues.description: getWindowInfo(record) is called 5 times per record in the template (lines 128-134): 3 times in v-if condition and 2 times in the content. This is inefficient.
issues.suggestion: Use a method that caches results or compute window info during record loading. Consider using a Map or adding a computed property for the window info display.

issues.description: Test files don't end with a newline character.
issues.suggestion: Add trailing newline for POSIX compliance.

strengths: All 159 tests pass, including 5 new tests for App.vue and 8 new tests for ScreenshotModal.vue
JSON parsing uses try/catch for graceful degradation when content is malformed or missing active_window
Conditional rendering prevents empty window info sections from appearing
Tests cover edge cases: missing active_window, empty window info, manual records, malformed JSON
Icon mapping covers common applications with sensible defaults
Clear comments linking code to SMART-001 Task 6
UI design is consistent with existing Tailwind patterns
